About

Urban Operating System

Made by Josh Roberts with AI for the Jamie Kent

Embedded library and technology attribution

  • PDF.js 2.16.105PDF parsing engine embedded as core and worker scripts. Copyright Mozilla Foundation. Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
  • Browser File, Blob, URL and Web Worker APIsUsed to read local import files and run the embedded PDF parser without external network dependencies.
  • Browser ZIP, XML and spreadsheet parsing helpersXLSX and ZIP imports are handled by the app’s embedded JavaScript plus native browser APIs such as DecompressionStream and DOMParser; no separate XLSX or ZIP library is bundled.
  • Standalone application codeAll dashboard, scheduler, importer, deduplication, modal, calendar, swipe and export behaviour is contained in this HTML file.
